name: Charles Kuralt
abstract: Charles Bishop Kuralt (September 10, 1934 – July 4, 1997) was an American television, newspaper and radio journalist and author. He is most widely known for his long career with CBS, first for his "On the Road" segments on The CBS Evening News with Walter Cronkite, and later as the first anchor of CBS News Sunday Morning, a position he h…

about_quotes.speaker: Ramsey Lewis
about_quotes.evidence: I know I was very, very impressed and honored that he called, asked me to do it, because at the time it was Charles Kuralt
about_quotes.doc_title: Ramsey Lewis — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral
about_quotes.evidence: Actually, I was the first one to work with him with Charlie Ventura... And so that’s when we first met him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998
